sections.title: Attempting to unlock the gate nearby him

lines.speaker: Wizard Frumscone
lines.text: You can't attack the Zombies in the room, my Zombies are for magic target practice only and should be attacked from the other side of the fence.

lines.speaker: Wizard Frumscone
lines.text: Do you like my magic Zombies? Feel free to kill them, there's plenty more where these came from!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I spoke to the necromancer like you suggested...

lines.speaker: Wizard Frumscone
lines.text: Please - let's not talk about it. Distentor and Zavistic would get very annoyed if they found I'd sent you to a necromancer.
